banner.title: Frontend Development Mentoring
banner.description: I don't just prepare for interviews—my students go to work and confidently handle all tasks. The real result is when support is no longer needed.

advantages.second: Students work at BigTech (Sber, Yandex, etc.)
advantages.third: Real commercial experience in the team.

strategy.title: We don't wait for a good market. We win in any market.
strategy.description: Job search is a separate skill that requires active actions.

pack.title: Packaging experience
pack.description: Any experience can be sold as strong - we will show you how.

ats.title: ATS and auto-filters
ats.description: Pass the selection and stand out among hundreds of candidates.

search.title: Search strategy
search.description: How to search for a job correctly and act in the market.

preparation.title: Preparation for interviews
preparation.description: Practice with people, complete mocks, and watch real interviews.

experience.title: Real experience
experience.description: No one needs pet projects. Work on a real production.

motivation.title: Motivation
motivation.description: Be surrounded by people with the same goal - the offer.

fullpath.title: Any level. Full path to the result.

levels.title: My goal is to make the student a strong developer, even without experience. Complete immersion in technology and real projects.
levels.subtitle: I help you get into work at any level

material.title: Completely your own materials
material.description: 200+ entries, checklists, guides, real interviews. Author's courses from HTML, JS and React to CI/CD, Docker and System Design. Everything is created by me - no other people's courses.

community.title: Community
community.description: 250+ active students, collaborative mocks, online coworking and group classes. Seeing the success of others, you join the race and move towards the offer.

structure.title: Structure and plan
structure.description: Theory + livecoding: preparation for interviews begins with the first lessons. After each section there is a knowledge control - without passing the exam we do not move on.

education.label: education
education.title: All-inclusive in education.
education.subtitle: Path to the offer
education.description: You come, and everything is taken care of for you: from the first steps to finding a job. You immerse yourself in an environment focused on results. I guide you at every stage.

01.title: Onboarding and first mock interview
01.description: We determine your starting level, get acquainted with the platform and tools. We conduct the first trial interview to understand the learning path and immediately identify key areas for growth.

02.title: Learning materials
02.description: Each module contains theory, a checklist of questions and practical tasks. Step by step you master HTML, JS, React, TypeScript, CI/CD, Docker and other technologies.

03.title: Support and community
03.description: All doubts and questions are resolved in the chat with students and with me personally. You get help at any stage, you don't get stuck, you move forward.

04.title: Exams and feedback
04.description: After each block you pass theory and tasks to the mentor. You get a detailed analysis of mistakes and advice on how to improve the result.

05.title: Progress control
05.description: I monitor performance, timely adjust training and help overcome difficulties. Your growth is always under my supervision.

06.title: Practice and group activities
06.description: 4 times a week: joint task reviews, mock interviews, code reviews and workshops. Constant engagement, calls and communication.

07.title: Final project
07.description: You build your application step by step after each technology. Not an online store or Weather app, but a real system with API and layouts, just like in a real job.

08.title: Internship on a real production project
08.description: You work in a team of 100+ people: Frontend, Backend, QA, design, analytics. Full development cycle, releases, code reviews, agile processes.

09.title: Preparation for the offer
09.description: We create a strong resume, conduct mock interviews, job search strategy. You are ready for any interview and can immediately show your competencies.

about.title: About me.
about.description: I'm all about real world skills. I help students become strong developers and get hired

achievements.first: I build projects from scratch and lead teams of 100+ specialists
achievements.second: In 5 years in IT, I grew from Junior to Senior
achievements.third: Built my own products and a developer ecosystem
achievements.fourth: Expertise: Frontend, Backend, DevOps, product and team management
achievements.fifth: Founder of Reactify — a large frontend community
achievements.sixth: I run YouTube and Telegram channels

stack.label: stack
stack.title: Full stack and tools.
stack.subtitle: You learn the full set of technologies and tools so you don't get lost on a real project or in a real team.
stack.description1: We cover the entire stack of a modern frontend developer: from the basics to advanced tools and architecture.
stack.description2: The program adapts to the student — we don't teach everything in order, but focus on what is really needed for employment.
